ORDER OF EXAMINATION: PROMISE TO APPEAR
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Continued To Jul-08-26 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for an Order of Examination as to Judgment Debtor Jazear Brooks.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505; Matter not reported

Judgment Creditor Ideo Colab Distributed Web Fund LP is present represented by Jacklin Wu.
Judgment Debtor Jazear Brooks is not present.

A $500.00 Bench warrant was previously issued on this matter for Mr. Brooks's failure to appear at a previous Order of Examination.

Ms. Wu stated to the court she has been in contact with Mr. Brooks and they both agreeing to have an Order of Examination on July 8, 2026.

This matter is contineud to July 8, 2026 at 11:00am in dept. 505 to give both sides an oppertunity to conduct the Order of Examination.

If no appearance by Mr. Brooks at the July 8, 2026 hearing, Ms. Wu may request another warrant this time for $1,000.00.

Added to ORDER OF EXAMINATION Calendar for Order Of Examination - Promise To Appear
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 No Appearance; Order To Arrest
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for an Order of Examination as to Judgment Debtor

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505; Matter not reported

Judgment Creditor Ideo Colab Distributed Web Fund is present represented by Jaqueline Wu.
Judgment Debtor Jazear Brooks is not present.

A Bench Warrant was previously entered in this matter for Mr. Brooks failure to appear. He promised the Sheriff's to appear on April 8, 2026. Mr. Brooks did not have all his documents ready at that calling and both parties stipulated to a continuance to April 29, 2026 at 11:00am in dept. 505.

As Mr. Brooks has not appeared at this calling, a bench warrant is issued for $1000.00.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Plaintiffs Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Jazear Brooks and Defendant Swish Labs, Inc.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 10:12:43 a.m., pausing at 10:13:22 a.m., resuming at 11:06:55 a.m., pausing at 11:19:11 a.m., resuming at 11:21:33 a.m. and concluding at 11:22:30 a.m. (D505)

Christman Rice, Esq. representing Plaintiff IDEO Colab Distributed Web Fund I LP and Plaintiff IDEO Colab Ventures GP LLC.
Defendant Jazear Brooks not appearing.
Defendant Swish Labs, Inc. not appearing.
Joe Gerber, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

The Court summarizes briefly the request for judgment.
Counsel offers proof as to the request.
The Court examines witness. Witness testifies.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:
Damages $10,333,809.42
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $28,705.03
Costs $5,560.97
Attorney's Fees $0
Total Judgment $10,368,075.42

Plaintiff to submit proposed judgment for review and signature of the court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Plaintiffs Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-31-2025 Continued To Apr-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:46 am and concluding at 10:00 am.

Plaintiff IDEO Colab Distributed Web Fund I LP. is represented by Chris Rice, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Jazear Brooks not appearing.

JOE GERBER is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

The Court addresses Plaintiff's counsel re: statment of damages.

The Court Finds that the Statment of Damages was not filed and was not served upon the Defendant.

The Court orders the matter continued to April 02, 2025 at 9:00 am in Department 505 to allow Plaintiff time to serve the statment of damages. (D505)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS IDEO COLAB DISTRIBUTED WEB FUND I LP, IDEO COLAB VENTURES GP LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Plaintiff Plaintiffs IDEO CoLab Distributed Web Fund I LP and IDEO CoLab Ventures GP LLC'S Motion to Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice is GRANTED. Counsel Christman Rice may appear as counsel pro hac vice for moving parties in this action.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
